title: Play Quacked SMP
description: Recommended Modpack for playing on QuackedSMP.  Includes ducks, simple voice chat, mini-map and more.  Used to play on play.quackedmod.wiki
body:
# 🦆QuackedSMP 🦆



## Recommended SMP Modpack for playing on QuackedSMP



### For players

This pack comes with:

- The Ducky Quack Pack
- Simple Voice Chat
- Talking Heads
- Xeoro's mini-map  
- iris and solas shader pack
- Nemo's Inventory Sorting
